mapper.select: SELECT e.*, r.role_name as role_name, r.role_code as role_code, jc.name as job_category_name FROM tb_employee e LEFT JOIN tb_role r ON e.role_id = r.id LEFT JOIN tb_job_category jc ON e.job_category_id = jc.id WHERE e.id = #{id}
SELECT e.* FROM tb_employee e WHERE e.name = #{name} AND e.password = #{password} AND e.status = 1
SELECT r.id, r.role_code, r.role_name FROM tb_role r INNER JOIN tb_employee e ON r.id = e.role_id WHERE e.id = #{employeeId}

SELECT e.*, r.role_name as role_name, r.role_code as role_code, jc.name as job_category_name FROM tb_employee e LEFT JOIN tb_role r ON e.role_id = r.id LEFT JOIN tb_job_category jc ON e.job_category_id = jc.id ORDER BY e.create_time DESC

SELECT e.*, r.role_name as role_name, r.role_code as role_code, jc.name as job_category_name FROM tb_employee e LEFT JOIN tb_role r ON e.role_id = r.id LEFT JOIN tb_job_category jc ON e.job_category_id = jc.id WHERE r.role_code = #{roleCode} AND e.status = 1

SELECT e.*, r.role_name as role_name, r.role_code as role_code, jc.name as job_category_name FROM tb_employee e LEFT JOIN tb_role r ON e.role_id = r.id LEFT JOIN tb_job_category jc ON e.job_category_id = jc.id WHERE LOWER(r.role_code) = 'finance' AND e.status = 1

SELECT e.*, r.role_name as role_name, r.role_code as role_code, jc.name as job_category_name FROM tb_employee e INNER JOIN tb_employee_project ep ON e.id = ep.employee_id LEFT JOIN tb_role r ON e.role_id = r.id LEFT JOIN tb_job_category jc ON e.job_category_id = jc.id WHERE ep.project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY e.create_time DESC
SELECT p.name FROM tb_project p INNER JOIN tb_employee_project ep ON p.id = ep.project_id WHERE ep.employee_id = #{employeeId} ORDER BY p.name ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_employee (name, role_id, phone, job_category_id, salary_amount, salary_type, password, status) VALUES (#{name}, #{roleId}, #{phone}, #{jobCategoryId}, #{salaryAmount}, #{salaryType}, #{password}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_employee SET name = #{name}, role_id = #{roleId}, phone = #{phone}, job_category_id = #{jobCategoryId}, salary_amount = #{salaryAmount}, salary_type = #{salaryType}, password = #{password}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
